name: Zoom
description: Monitor Zoom user access and account security settings including two-factor authentication compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to Zoom App Marketplace (marketplace.zoom.us)
2. Click 'Develop' > Build App > OAuth
3. Add redirect URL: https://api.trycomp.ai/v1/integrations/oauth/callback
4. Add scopes: user:read:admin, account:read:admin
5. Copy Client ID and Client Secret

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews active Zoom users to verify employee access management

checks.name: 2FA
checks.description: Verifies that two-factor authentication is enforced for Zoom account sign-in
